examples: The middle of a circle is the point which has the same distance to every point of circle.

definitions.text: The part between the beginning and the end.
examples: I woke up in the middle of the night.
In the middle of the marathon, David collapsed from fatigue.

definitions.text: Located in the middle; in between.
examples: middle name, Middle English, Middle Ages

definitions.text: To take a middle view of. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
To double (a rope) into two equal portions; to fold in the middle.
To strike (the ball) with the middle portion of the face of the bat.
